summary: Iteration 141: UX/UI Rebuild Testing Complete. All 5 redesigned pages (Revenue, Operations, Risk, Compliance, Market) load successfully with new surface primitives. Business DNA KPI tab works correctly. SMB Protect naming verified in pricing tiers.

minor.issue: Intermittent timeout (30s) on preview backend - expected behavior per agent notes
Intermittent timeout (30s) on preview backend - expected behavior per agent notes

integration_issues.issue: WebSocket connection refused on ws://127.0.0.1:443/ws - appears non-critical, pages load successfully

issues: Old 'Growth' naming still present in /app/frontend/src/pages/website/PricingPage.js - may be intentional for public site vs in-app subscribe page

action_items: Consider updating PricingPage.js to use SMB Protect naming if consistency is desired
critical_code_review_comments: SurfacePrimitives.js is well-structured with reusable components for explainability strips, metric cards, and source clarity panels
All redesigned pages use consistent data-testid attributes for testing
SMB Protect naming correctly applied in pricingTiers.js (id='enterprise', name='SMB Protect') and tier_resolver.py (BRAIN_PLAN_LABELS)

success_rate.backend: 75% (6/8 tests passed - 2 failed due to expected preview backend timeouts)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 5 pages + KPI tab + subscribe page working)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 141 tested the UX/UI rebuild across Revenue, Operations, Risk, Compliance, Market pages. All pages render correctly with new SurfacePrimitives components. Data-testid attributes are in place. Preview backend has expected timeout behavior on health/warmup endpoints. WebSocket errors are non-critical.
